name: Broccoli Salad with Vinaigrette Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the broccoli until fork-tender.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the oil, vinegar, garlic, orange juice, and Dijon mustard.
3. Add the cooked broccoli to the dressing and toss until well combined.
4. Serve warm or at room temperature.
5. Sprinkle the grated carrot over the top before serving.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 58; PRO: 2g; CAR: 8g; FAT: 6g; SOD: 47;
Makes 4 servings.
Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, M.S., R.D. Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
